summary: GM Dashboard Bug Fix Verification - PASS. Tested GM login redirect fix and GM Command Center functionality. All 5 features working correctly: GM redirect to /gm-dashboard, stats cards display, Planning tab with RE Projects, View dialog with full scope of works, Download PDF button.

minor.issue: Returns 403 Forbidden for GM user (expected based on role permissions)

critical_code_review_comments: GM redirect fix in Dashboard.jsx (lines 65-68 and 183-186) is correctly implemented
GMDashboard.jsx has comprehensive RE Project view with Client Info, Project Details, Scope of Works table, and Estimated Total
PDF generation using jsPDF with branded company header (URBAN SPACE BUILDERS) is well implemented

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All GM Dashboard features working correctly

seed_data_creation: None - used existing RE Projects (RE - Mr.Vinoth, Rajesh Villa Project)
context_for_next_testing_agent: GM Dashboard bug fix verified. GM user now correctly redirects to /gm-dashboard instead of /approvals. The GM Command Center has: Overview tab (All Projects Status table), Planning tab (RE Projects with View/Download), Projects tab (Project Approvals), Site Engineer tab, Accounts tab. RE Project View dialog shows full scope of works with itemized costs and branded PDF download.

gm_login_redirect.details: GM user correctly redirects to /gm-dashboard after login (Dashboard.jsx lines 65-68 and 183-186)

gm_command_center_loads.details: GM Command Center displays with header, user info (Suresh Menon, GENERAL MANAGER), and logout button

stats_cards.details: 6 stats cards visible: Total Projects (6), Active Projects (0), Pending Approvals (1), RE Approvals (0), Site Requests (0), Completed (0)

planning_tab_re_projects.details: Planning tab shows 'Rough Estimate Projects' section with 2 RE Projects: RE - Mr.Vinoth (In Progress, ₹70,00,000) and Rajesh Villa Project (converted, ₹22,00,000)

view_dialog_scope_of_works.details: View button opens dialog with: Client Information (Name, Phone, Email, Location), Project Details (Name, Square Feet, Building Type, Handover), Scope of Works table (S.No, Description, Qty, Unit, Rate, Amount), Estimated Total card

download_pdf_button.details: Download PDF button present in dialog header, generates branded PDF via jsPDF with URBAN SPACE BUILDERS branding

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: GM users were being redirected to /approvals instead of /gm-dashboard
bug_fix_verification.fix_location: Dashboard.jsx - Lines 65-68 (early redirect in useEffect) and Lines 183-186 (role check in render)
bug_fix_verification.current_behavior: GM users now correctly redirect to /gm-dashboard upon login
